tasks_completed: Create src/txlog.py — in-memory transaction logger with log(), count_calls(), get_recent()
Create src/pricing.py — three-tier surge pricing using txlog
tasks_remaining: Create src/test_pricing.py and verify it passes
learnings: The brief references src/gateway.py and src/services.py but the actual gateway is src/server.py. Wire changes there.
Module-level singleton pattern: txlog = TransactionLog() at bottom of txlog.py for shared state.
src/server.py uses PaymentsMCP with @mcp.tool(credits=X) decorators — no find_service or buy_and_call tools yet. The brief's gateway wiring needs to adapt to this architecture or add those tools.
SURGE_THRESHOLD_HIGH/MEDIUM env vars configure tier thresholds (defaults: 20/10).
